response.justification: Candidate has a strong overall engineering background with relevant geospatial/GIS experience (GISCollective, Green Map) and some low-latency systems work at Sociomantic with DLang. However, the role's primary requirement is modern C++ or equivalent Rust expertise, and the candidate's only C++ exposure was ~6 months at National Instruments over a decade ago. Recent work is almost entirely TypeScript/Node.js, with no Rust and no navigation/routing pipeline experience. The systems-programming and core language fit are too weak for a Senior IC role on a routing tiling pipeline.
strengths: Hands-on geospatial/GIS platform experience (GISCollective, Open Green Map)
Low-latency, high-throughput services background at Sociomantic (fibers, async I/O)
Strong engineering discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source contributions)
concerns: Minimal and outdated C++ experience (~6 months in 2014–2015); no Rust experience
Recent decade is dominated by web/full-stack TypeScript/Node, not systems-level work
No navigation, routing, or map data pipeline experience
